ListPfs.maxKeys: Maximum number of instances returned per list is 1000, default is 20; valid range is [1, 1000], values out of range will be clamped to 1 or 1000
ListPfs.manner: Pagination type of the request; marker must be specified
ListPfs.marker: Results are sorted by instanceId (format is typically "pfs-xxxxxx") in lexicographic order; returns entries starting after the specified marker (marker itself is excluded)
